Name: Simple Green All-Purpose Cleaner & Degreaser Concentrate
Long Description: EPA Safer Choice Certified Simple Green All-Purpose Cleaner is a powerful cleaner and degreaser designed for effective and environmentally safer use on all washable surfaces. The biodegradable formula easily removes tough dirt and grime without chemicals that can harm people and the environment. Concentrated formula provides up to 30x the cleaning value. Use it full-strength for heavy messes, or easily dilute with water for daily cleaning. Removes built-up dirt, grease, food spills, ink, pet stains and other tough grime indoors and out. For use on floors, carpets, walls, countertops, appliances, furniture, fabric, tools and more. This versatile cleaner can easily replace a cabinet full of harsh cleaners, detergents, degreasers and laundry pre-soaks, making clean-up simple and safer. Leaves behind a fresh sassafras scent. This formula is readily biodegradable per OECD 301D. Backed by our 100% money-back guarantee.

Name: Goof Off Pro Strength Remover
Long Description: Goof Off Pro Strength works the first time quickly and easily removing those tough spots and stains ordinary household cleaners can't. Removes: Adhesives & glue, crayon, pen & marker, gum, scuff marks, stickers & decals, asphalt & tar, dried latex paint, duct tape, caulk, tree sap, candle wax, lipstick, oil & grease and more. Ideal for all kinds of hard surfaces including: Fully cured varnished or oil-based painted surfaces, baseboards all metals, glass, brick, wood, concrete, grout, fiberglass, hand tools, and most automotive surfaces. Do not use on plastics, worn vinyl floors, some automotive paints, and some carpets. Always test on an inconspicuous area first, as every hard surface is different.

Name: Wooster Pro/Doo-Z FTP Woven Fabric Roller Cover
Long Description: Shed-resistant and high density for today's paints: flat, eggshell, satin, semigloss, gloss, enamels, primers, urethanes and epoxies. HydroFlow technology provides controlled release to improve paint flow. Wooster-exclusive fabric with double golden pinstripe for smooth finish, great capacity. Green double-thick polypropylene core resists water, solvents and cracking.

Name: Wooster Jumbo-Koter Pro/Doo-Z FTP Woven Fabric Roller Cover
Long Description: Jumbo-Koter Pro/Doo-Z FTP is shed-resistant for the smoothest professional finish with all paints, enamels, primers, urethanes, epoxies and adhesives. High-density white fabric with a golden pinstripe, exclusively from Wooster, stays resilient and resists matting.

Name: Method All-Purpose Cleaner
Long Description: Grease and grime don't stand a chance. Not with powerful, plant-based cleaning agents in your grasp. With a biodegradable formula, each squirt cuts through dirt + gunk, leaving behind the pleasant scent of victory.

Name: Method All-Purpose Cleaner
Long Description: Grease and grime don't stand a chance. Not with powerful, plant-based cleaning agents in your grasp. With a biodegradable formula, each squirt cuts through dirt + gunk, leaving behind the pleasant scent of victory.

Name: PIP Pro Safety Organic Vapor N95 Disposable Respirator
Long Description: The PIP Pro Safety N95 Organic Vapor Respirator is designed to filter out airborne particles and provide a secure fit for the wearer. Its foldable design allows for easy storage and transportation, making it ideal for on-the-go use. The ultra-sonic welded head straps offer enhanced durability and strength, ensuring that the respirator stays securely in place even during rigorous activities. This respirator features an innovative nose clip that can be easily adjusted to ensure a secure and personalized fit. The foam nosepiece not only enhances comfort but also helps to create a tight seal, preventing any unwanted particles or contaminants from entering the respiratory system. The disposable nature of the respirator makes it convenient and hygienic, allowing for easy disposal after use. Trust in this indispensable tool in any environment where respiratory safety is paramount.

Name: Zep Bleach Resistant Spray Bottle
Long Description: Zep sprayers are known for quality and performance. Zep's Bleach Resistant Sprayer is the next resolution in our revolutionary line-up of sprayers. We know that pros rely on the right tools to get the job done. This chemical resistance sprayers stands up to harsh bleach and chemicals. This product is designed to spray upside down and at any angle for those hard-to-reach spots. Fill the Zep Bleach Resistant Sprayer with bleach, any of Zep's EPA registered disinfectants, or Zep's large line of pro-strength cleaners for a next level clean.

Name: Dap Pre-Mixed Latex Wallboard Drywall Joint Compound
Long Description: A latex joint compound for treating taped joints of interior gypsum panels. Also may be used for finishing and patching. Clean up with water. Interior use. White.

Name: Goof Off Pro Strength Remover
Long Description: Goof Off Pro Strength works the first time quickly and easily removing those tough spots and stains ordinary household cleaners can't. Removes: Adhesives & glue, crayon, pen & marker, gum, scuff marks, stickers & decals, asphalt & tar, dried latex paint, duct tape, caulk, tree sap, candle wax, lipstick, oil & grease and more. Ideal for all kinds of hard surfaces including: Fully cured varnished or oil-based painted surfaces, baseboards all metals, glass, brick, wood, concrete, grout, fiberglass, hand tools, and most automotive surfaces. Do not use on plastics, worn vinyl floors, some automotive paints, and some carpets. Always test on an inconspicuous area first, as every hard surface is different.

Name: Gorilla Double-Sided Mounting Tape
Long Description: Gorilla Mounting Tape is a double-sided tape that mounts in an instant, for a permanent, weatherproof bond. The adhesive tape won't yellow over time. This tape is perfect for indoor and outdoor projects and is an excellent alternative to nails and screws. It conforms to smooth and rough surfaces to form a permanent, industrial strength bond. Bonds permanently to plastic, metal, wood, glass, brick, ceramic, stone, and more.

Name: Zep Commercial Floor Grout Cleaner
Long Description: Zep Grout Cleaner & Brightener is a pro-strength acidic formula that deep cleans and lifts tough stains from grout in minutes. The squeeze-bottle design allows for easy application with no heavy scrubbing needed. Safe for use on both white and tinted grout, it quickly brightens and restores grout lines.

Name: Rain-X Original Water Repellent
Long Description: For windshields, mirrors and lights, glass shower doors, and home glass windows. Forms a super-slick, invisible repellent coating. Makes rain, sleet and snow bead-up and roll off. Restricts adhesion and build-up of frost, bugs, salt, tree sap, mud, and road grime. Avoid using on plastic surfaces, plexiglass, and fiberglass.

Name: Gorilla Double-Sided Mounting Tape
Long Description: Gorilla Mounting Tape is a double-sided tape that mounts in an instant, for a permanent, weatherproof bond. The adhesive tape won't yellow over time. This tape is perfect for indoor and outdoor projects and is an excellent alternative to nails and screws. It conforms to smooth and rough surfaces to form a permanent, industrial strength bond. Bonds permanently to plastic, metal, wood, glass, brick, ceramic, stone, and more.

Name: Petmate Chuckit Ball Launcher Dog Toy
Long Description: Classic ball launcher that is convenient to carry and use. Features an extendable, ergonomic handle and a convenient clip that can be hooked to a belt or leash for portability. Throw tennis balls 2-3 times farther than throwing by hand. Hands free ball pick up. Compatible with standard tennis ball and Chuckit tennis ball.

Name: Little Big Shot Twist Nozzle
Long Description: Saves water and gives more power - uses 40% less water than a classic pistol nozzle. Twist to adjust from maximum power to pinpoint accuracy or full Off (Power Sweep, Spray and Pin-Point). Pinpoint accuracy even under low water pressure and continuous adjusting. Will not leak. Made in the USA and assembled by disabled veterans.

Name: DAP AMP Kitchen, Bath & Plumbing Sealant
Long Description: DAPs AMP Advanced Modified Polymer Kitchen, Bath and Plumbing Sealant provides a 100% waterproof seal with the ability to be applied on wet and damp surfaces. It has a fast 30-minute paint and water ready time and prevents the growth of stains and odor-causing mold and mildew on the sealant. For interior use. This premium hybrid technology offers maximum flexibility and superior adhesion for a durable seal that wont crack or shrink. It is safe for marble and granite and most metals and prevents mold and mildew growth for a lifetime guarantee. DAP AMP Kitchen, Bath and Plumbing sealant is easy to use, low in odor, VOC compliant and ideal for interior kitchen and bath applications.

Name: Maggie's Farm Outdoor Mosquito Fogger
Long Description: Kills and repels mosquitoes, flies, gnats, moths, and other flying insects. Lasts up to 8 hours. Made from natural plant oils.

Name: Perky-Pet Glass Hummingbird Feeder
Long Description: 8 Oz. glass feeder. Bottle unscrews for easy filling and cleaning. 4 flower feeding ports. Features a built-in ant moat and hanging hook. Bee guard opens for easy cleaning.

Name: Hefty Large Vacuum Seal Storage Bags
Long Description: Hefty Shrink-Pak travel is compressed, space-saving storage and organization. Clear, see through storage bag with a red and yellow Double Closure zipper that slides together for a Double Closure, air tight seal. Shrink-Pak travel is confidently devoted to shrinking and packing your things.

Name: Zep Drain Defense Crystal Drain Cleaner
Long Description: Enzymatic drain cleaner ends slow drains. Safe for all pipes and septic systems. Environmentally safe, USDA approved. Prevents clogs by cleaning and removing build-up. Regular use keeps pipes clean. Jar provides 50 treatments.

Name: Krylon Professional Solvent-Based Striping Paint
Long Description: A highly pigmented paint that produces sharp, durable stripes in one pass. Cans spray in an upside-down position. From contracting sites to parking lots, wherever bright crisp lines are required, this paint will do a professional-looking job quickly and easily. Covers approximately 29 Sq. Ft. per 18 Oz. can. Dries fast.

Name: Wooster Super/Fab FTP Knit Fabric Roller Cover
Long Description: Shed-resistant and high capacity For Today's Paints: flat, eggshell, satin. HydroFlow technology provides controlled release, prevents sagging. Lager-colored fabric exclusively from Wooster for fastest coverage, non-matting for longer life. Polypropylene core resists water, solvents, and cracking. 9 In., 14 In., and 18 In. have green double-thick polypropylene core.

Name: Slime ATV & Mower Tubeless Tire Sealant
Long Description: 24-ounce tubeless sealant for ATV and mowers. Slime can be installed as a pre-treatment before a puncture occurs. Slime can also be used to repair a flat tire or a slow leak. Simply remove the valve core from your tire, inject Slime, re-inflate, and rotate it.

Name: Safety Works Professional 12 In. Safety Cone
Long Description: Hi-visibility orange safety cone. Made of flexible flow mold plastic.

Name: Flex Shot Adhesive Rubber Sealant
Long Description: Flex Caulk Silicone (100% silicone caulk) are our latest innovations in caulking technology. They are delivered through our Adjustable Trigger Flow Nozzle, which eliminates the need for a caulking gun and allows you to control the flow of caulk. Just adjust the flow setting and push the trigger for a perfect bead. And when you stop, it stops. There's no running, no dripping, and no mess.

Name: Flex Shot Adhesive Rubber Sealant
Long Description: Flex Caulk Silicone (100% silicone caulk) are our latest innovations in caulking technology. Long Description: Ready-to-light charcoal briquets. No lighter fluid needed. New shape and enhanced formula for more grilling power. More edges and surface area to catch the flame quickly. The grooves provide air channels for fast heating and even burning. More high quality ingredients for longer burn time.

Name: Kingsford Charcoal Briquets
Long Description: Charcoal briquets featuring more edges and surface area to catch the flame quickly. Grooves provide air channels for fast heating and even burning. More high quality ingredients for longer burn time.

Name: La Crosse Technology Equity Waylon Hygrometer & Thermometer
Long Description: Designed to be hung indoors or outdoors with weather sealed case. This clock features a thermometer and hygrometer. Lens is glass with metal hands and a rich oil rubbed bronze UV and weather resistant case.

Name: Woodland Bypass Pruning Snip
Long Description: Stainless steel blades with Teflon coating stay sharp longer. Re-engineered lock for additional comfort. Internal spring mechanism keeps the spring out of the way during work to guarantee it will never fall out or get lost. Improved hardware for better durability and a more uniform appearance. 5/8 In. cutting capacity. Anti-slip grips provide full control during wet or muddy work. Works great with both left and right-handed users.

Name: MAJIC Barn & Fence Exterior Latex Flat Paint, 1 Gal.
Long Description: A durable latex finish that will protect your barn and fence from wear and weather. Dries bug free in 30 minutes. Provides a weather and fade resistant finish.

Name: Flex Caulk Hybrid Caulk Cartridge With Adjustable Nozzle
Long Description: Trigger flow nozzle means no need for caulk gun. Perfect for indoor projects such as kitchen and bath, while also great for outdoor applications such as windows and doors. Will not dry hard and become cracked and brittle. Easy to store with out product drying out.

Name: Flex Caulk Hybrid Caulk Cartridge With Adjustable Nozzle
Long Description: Trigger flow nozzle means no need for caulk gun. Perfect for indoor projects such as kitchen and bath, while also great for outdoor applications such as windows and doors. Will not dry hard and become cracked and brittle. Easy to store with out product drying out.

Name: Fiskars Forged Bypass Pruner
Long Description: With traditional drop-forged steel construction, the weight and feel provide rugged durability. Downward-angled cutting head keeps your wrist in the optimal position for reduced fatigue. 3/4 In. cutting capacity.

Name: Crescent Wiss Tradesman Utility Shears
Long Description: Crescent Wiss Utility Shears feature premium steel blades, precision-engineered with knife-like edges to deliver ten times the cutting power of standard shears. Their titanium blade coating is three times harder than steel for extra durability and longer edge life and their compact design is made for easy portability. A serrated bottom blade grips material for better control and cleaner cuts, while spring loaded design and optimized handle contact points improve comfort and reduce fatigue. A quick release ergonomic latch that locks the shears closed for transport and soft-grip TPR handles are added safety and comfort features. Crescent Wiss Utility Shears are the perfect choice when you need exceptional cutting power in a compact tool.

Name: Krud Kutter Multi-Purpose House Wash
Long Description: Removes tough stains such as mildew, mold, dirt, and grease on most exterior surfaces including roofs, siding, decks, and driveways. No bleach or ammonia. Safe for people, pets, and plants. To apply, put valve in the clean position and apply from top to bottom. Allow cleaner to work on surface 5 to 10 minutes. To rinse, put valve in rinse position and turn hose on full pressure. If surface is extremely soiled, it may be necessary to scrub surface with a bristle brush and apply a second time. 1 Gal. cleans 4000 Sq. Ft. and can be applied by pressure washer, pump-up sprayer, brush, or roller. 56 Oz. bottle has convenient hose end attachment.

Name: Rust-Oleum Stops Rust Door & Trim Paint
Long Description: Rust-Oleum Stops Rust Door and Trim Paint is a fast drying, durable formula that delivers a fresh new look to indoor/outdoor doors and trim. Fully dry in only 6 hours for faster project completion. Applies smoothly with brush or roller.

Name: Amflo PVC Air Hose
Long Description: Ideal for general purpose applications, DIY (do it yourself) use, compressor-operated hand tools and air assisted residential painting equipment. Long life engineered composition PVC (polyvinyl chloride) hose. Lightweight with a flexible, kink-resistant design. Nonconductive and oil and abrasion-resistant. The bright fluorescent color reduces the chance of accidents. Two year warranty.

Name: Libman Medium Sweep Multi-Surface Push Broom
Long Description: 3 In. long firm yet flexible split-top fibers pick up dust and dirt from a variety of surfaces. Environmentally friendly fiber made from recycled pet water bottles. 1 In. dia. x 60 In. L. threaded steel handle with hex nut and locking bolt. Hanger tip for convenient storage.

Name: Wiss Metalmaster Offset Snips
Long Description: Offset blades keep hands clear of metal. Non-slip serrated jaw of molybdenum steel for compound lever action. Withstands strain of cutting heavy stock and tight curves. Spring-action for fast, effortless feed. Handy hang-up hole. Non-slip, textured grips and safety latch for superior control. Cuts low carbon cold rolled steel.

Name: Wiss Metalmaster Offset Snips
Long Description: Offset blades keep hands clear of metal. Non-slip serrated jaw of molybdenum steel for compound lever action. Withstands strain of cutting heavy stock and tight curves. Name: Drip EZ Collapsible Storage Bin
Long Description: V2 prep tub features a built-in nylon cutting board and lid with locking hinges. Adjusts to 3 different heights and collapses for easy kitchen storage. Dishwasher safe. BPA free.

Name: Harvest Lane Honey Bee Hive Stimulant
Long Description: Bee hive stimulant. Makes 5 feedings. Easy to use, concentrate used in liquid feed.

Name: Corona Classic Cut Bypass Pruner With Wire Cutting Notch
Long Description: Forged steel alloy construction, resharpenable bypass blade with wire-cutting notch. Slant-ground, narrow profile hook. Will cut branches to 1 In. diameter. Sap groove keeps blade from sticking. Comfortable, nonslip cushioned grips. Lifetime warranty.

Name: Flood CWF-UV Oil-Modified Fence Deck and Siding Wood Finish
Long Description: Provides a natural finish that protects wood against moisture and sun damage. Fortified with PENETROL for excellent penetration. Recommended for use on any properly prepared exterior wood, including decks, fences, siding, railings, outdoor furniture and other wood surfaces. Apply to new, dry pressure-treated wood, uncoated new or weathered wood, or wood previously stained or painted. Apply directly to weathered wood previously finished with FLOOD CWF-UV; other previous coating must be completely removed. Easy soap and water clean-up.

Name: MAJIC Industrial Aluminum Paint
Long Description: Majic Industrial Aluminum Paint is a ready-mixed, ready-to-use aluminum paint formulated for use on metal, wood or masonry surfaces. Recommended for radiators, boilers, smoke stacks and other surfaces where a heat-resistant coating is necessary.

Name: Drip EZ Collapsible Storage Bin
Long Description: V2 prep tub features a built-in nylon cutting board and lid with locking hinges. Adjusts to 3 different heights and collapses for easy kitchen storage. Dishwasher safe. BPA free.

Name: Genesis 20V 1/2" Cordless Drill Kit
Long Description: The Genesis GLD2012B  Cordless Drill is Fully Featured and Designed to Take on the Most Demanding Projects. The 1/2" Single Sleeve All-Metal Ratcheting Chuck Securely Holds Bits. The High-Performance Motor Produces up to 450 in-lb of Torque, and the 2-Speed Gear Box Provides the Power and Speed to Match your Task. An LED Fuel Gauge Indicates the Remaining Charge. Includes: 2.0 Ah Battery and Quick Charger.

Name: Crescent Lufkin Professional Centerline SAE Measuring Wheel
Long Description: Suitable for measuring vertical, horizontal or curved surfaces, the large Crescent Crescent Lufkin Professional Centerline SAE Measuring Wheel displays surface dimensions in feet and inches for quick, accurate distance calculations. It features a 12-inch wheel with a rubber tire for superb traction on the uneven terrain of jobsites or long indoor expanses. The analog counter dial calibrated to the wheel counts to 10,000 ft. before rolling over to 0.

Name: DEWALT 20V MAX LED Hand Held Area Cordless Work Light - Tool Only
Long Description: Illuminate dark jobsite work areas with the DCL050 20V MAX Hand Held Area LED Work Light. This area light is designed with 2 brightness settings (1000 and 500 lumens) that provide versatility for maximum light output or extended run time. Tool only - battery and charger not included.

Name: Genesis 1/2 In. Impact Wrench
Long Description: Quickly tighten and loosen large nuts, bolts and other fasteners. 1/2 in square drive, 220 ft-lb maximum torque. Die-cast aluminum gear housing for durability. Rocker style switch for one-handed operation. Rated power 120 V, 60 Hz, 7.5 A, no load speed 0 to 2100 rpm. Impacts per minute 0 to 2700 ipm. Includes 4 sockets 11/16 in, 3/4 in, 13/16 in, 7/8 in and heavy-duty storage case.

Name: Insinkerator 1/2 HP Badger 5 Garbage Disposer
Long Description: Dependable performance at a moderate price. Includes 1/2 HP induction motor, tough galvanized steel shredder ring, 26 oz. grind chamber capacity with stainless steel lugs and sink flange. Plastic sink stopper. Self-service wrench frees simple jams. Has Quick Lock system for fast, easy installation. 3 year in-home service warranty. Formerly Model B5.

Name: Wayne 1/2HP Submersible Sump Pump
Long Description: This 1/2 HP Wayne Pump is assembled in the USA and Tested to 1 million cycles for performance that lasts. Delivers dependable, energy-efficient, ultra-quiet performance for years to come - warrantied for 5 years. Able to pump up to 5100 gallons per hour.

Name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL XC Lithium-Ion Brushless Cordless Impact Driver Kit
Long Description: The MILWAUKEE M18 FUEL Hex Impact Driver is the Most POWERFUL and FASTEST DRIVING impact driver, featuring ULTIMATE TRIGGER CONTROL. MILWAUKEE POWERSTATE Brushless motor delivers unmatched power for a full range of capabilities to complete the widest variety of applications. Increase productivity on the jobsite with the fastest driving speed of any impact driver without sacrificing power or control. MILWAUKEE REDLINK PLUS intelligence delivers ULTIMATE TRIGGER CONTROL by providing smooth acceleration for small fasteners to prevent stripping of screws or damaging of materials. MILWAUKEE M18 REDLITHIUM Battery Packs deliver more work per charge and more work over the life of the pack. Featuring 4-mode drive control provides users with greater control over output speed and power. Self-Tapping Screw Mode is designed to reduce walking when starting self-tapping screws as well as reduce overdriving, breaking, and stripping out screws. This new impact driver also features Tri-LED lighting, illuminating the area of work while eliminating shadows. The M18 FUEL Hex Impact Driver is part of MILWAUKEE M18 system which is fully compatible with over 200+ solutions. Includes (2) M18 REDLITHIUM XC5.0 batteries (48-11-1850), (1) M18 & M12 multi-voltage charger (48-59-1812), (1) belt clip, (1) bit holder, and (1) carrying case.

Name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL XC Lithium-Ion Brushless Cordless Hammer Drill Kit
Long Description: The MILWAUKEE M18 FUEL Hammer Drill Driver is the Industry's Most Powerful Hammer Drill, delivering the capability to drill the largest holes at high speed into the densest materials. The cordless drill is the Most Compact solution in its class and features AutoStop Control Mode for Enhanced Safety. The POWERSTATE Brushless motor delivers the most power under load to complete 2-9/16 In. Self-Feed holes in dense woods for increased productivity. At only 6.9 in length, this is the most compact cordless drill in its class for the best access and maneuverability in tight spaces. The AutoStop Control Mode offers enhanced safety for the operator by preventing over-rotation in a bind-up with the best reaction time in the industry. The REDLINK PLUS intelligence ensures maximum performance and protects from overloads, heating, and over-discharge. The MILWAUKEE M18 REDLITHIUM battery packs deliver more work per charge and more work over the life of the pack when compared to competitors. The all metal ratcheting chuck is the best-in-class. This provides increased grip strength, durability, and corrosion resistance. Includes (2) M18 REDLITHIUM XC5.0 extened capacity battery pack (48-11-1850), (1) M18 & M12 multi-voltage charger (48-59-1812), (1) side handle, and (1) blow molding carrying case.

Name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR Brushless Cordless Finish Nailer Kit
Long Description: The DEWALT DCN650 15 Gauge Angled Finish Nailer drives 15 Gauge angled finish nails from 1-1/4" to 2-1/2" which makes it ideal for fastening crown molding, casing, baseboards, and hardwood floor installation. With its brushless motor powered by a DEWALT 20V MAX Lithium-Ion battery, the DCN650 is ready to go to work without the hassle of using gas, compressor, and hose. Tackle jobs both large and small with the features of a pneumatic tool and the freedom of cordless. Includes nailer, 2.0 Ah battery, charger, and kit bag.

Name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL Lithium-Ion High Torque Brushless Cordless Impact Wrench Kit
Long Description: The MILWAUKEE M18 FUEL High Torque Impact Wrench w/ Friction Ring Kit includes the most power-dense impact wrench in its class, provides greater access in tight spaces, and maximizes productivity through faster removal speeds. The POWERSTATE Brushless Motor delivers up to 1,100 ft-lbs of Fastening Torque and 1,500 ft-lbs of Nut-Busting Torque when paired with the M18 REDLITHIUM XC5.0 Battery, while the compact size at 7.6" in length gives users greater access in tight spaces. The M18 FUEL High Torque Impact Wrench w/ Friction Ring maximizes productivity on the jobsite and in the shop by removing stubborn bolts and fasteners faster than cordless competitors. The patented battery isolation system provides a secure battery connection and controls vibration transmitted to the pack. Tri-LEDs surround the anvil to deliver brighter light with fewer shadows. 4-Mode DRIVE CONTROL offers greater precision with a range of pre-set RPM and IPM levels, selectable from a single button on the tool. By selecting Mode 4, AUTO SHUT-OFF control applies no more than 50 ft-lbs of torque for hand-tight fastening applications to prevent overtightening. Mode 4 also features Bolt Removal Control that delivers our users full torque output, then decreases RPMs once the bolt is loosened to prevent fastener drops. The Friction Ring design allows for quick & tool-free socket changes. The included battery provides increased protection against oils, greases, & solvents. Includes impact wrench, (2) M18 REDLITHIUM XC5.0 Resistant batteries, M18 & M12 multi-voltage charger, and hard case.

Name: Police Security Lookout Focusing LED Headlamp
Long Description: 1000-lumen output LED (light emitting diode) headlamp. Ideal lighting option for hands-free activities. Features Slide Focus optics, three modes, and a pivoting head for added flexibility. The adjustable headband is comfortable for long-time wear. Functions: High/Low/Flash/Focus Beam. Light Output: High/1000 lumens, Low/300 lumens. Run Time: High/4 Hours, Low/15 Hours. Beam Distance: High/180 Meters, Low/60 Meters. Requires (4)AA alkaline batteries, included. Uses XML LED chip for a lifespan of 100,000 hours. Water resistant. Lifetime warranty.

Name: Black Gold Organic Lawn & Garden Compost
Long Description: An organic, nutrient rich compost ideal for improving soil's natural structure or for use as above-ground mulch, this mixture of Canadian sphagnum peat, forest humus, and aged compost will increase flower blooms and vegetable yields. OMRI (Organic Materials Review Institute) listed.

Name: Cadet Gourmet Natural Dog Treat
Long Description: Cadet has been providing naturally delicious chews and treats dogs crave for over 30 years. Featuring real ingredients your best friend will love, Cadet Gourmet Chicken Breast is a wholesome reward. These premium dog treats are high in protein, providing essential amino acids that support overall wellness. Each low-fat treat is made with limited, natural ingredients you can pronounceno artificial colors, fillers, or flavors. Plus, these oven-roasted fillets make great training treats for dogs. Give your four-legged friend the delicious and nutritious dog treats they deserve.

Name: Koch Red Head Hitch Pin
Long Description: Vinyl coated handle hitch pin with hair pin. Grade 5: Forged head, high carbon steel, heat treated. Used for pulling heavier loads that require more than a Grade 2 performance. Used for coupling implements and machinery.

Name: Black Gold Natural & Organic Raised Bed & Potting Soil Mix
Long Description: An all natural and organic raised bed mix formulated by professional horticulturists. Contains a nutrient rich blend of Canadian sphagnum peat moss, earthworm castings, forest products, compost, and organic fertilizer. Ideal for any herb, vegetable or flower garden in raised beds or containers. Provides moisture retention and excellent drainage. Formulated with an organic fertilizer that promotes stronger stems and improved root mass. OMRI (Organic Materials Review Institute) listed.

Name: Black Gold Garden Soil
Long Description: Garden soil regionally formulated by professional horticulturists to best suit local garden soils. Ideal for use in vegetable gardens, flower gardens, or for flowering bedding plants and small fruits. Improves soil structure by adding organic matter. Feeds plants for up to 6 months with controlled release fertilizer. 0.05 - 0.02 - 0.05 formulation.

Name: Clorox Pro Results Outdoor Bleach
Long Description: Clorox Concentrated Outdoor Bleach makes it easy to tackle outdoor stains, dirt and grime, mold, mildew and algae on patio furniture, decks, fences, driveways, house siding and more with this outdoor bleach cleaner. This concentrated bleach has more whitening and disinfecting power versus the previous Clorox Outdoor Bleach. Get more cleaning power per drop compared to the previous Clorox Outdoor Bleach and reduce the amount of bleach required for cleaning. Bring Americas #1 bleach outside and make cleaning and removing outdoor stains a breeze. Great for use in a pump sprayer, no mixing or measuring required. The thicker formula reduces splashing and spilling, so that you can tackle any outdoor mess with less mess. Give your home some curb appeal with the power of Clorox. A little goes a long way with Clorox Pro Results Outdoor Bleach.

Name: MILWAUKEE Black Marker
Long Description: The MILWAUKEE INKZALL 2IN1 Deep Reach Ultra Fine Point Jobsite Marker is designed with an adjustable length tip to provide better access and longer life. The durable marker tip can withstand writing on rough surfaces and writes through dusty, wet, or oily contamination. For added user convenience, the 2IN1 INKZALL marker is built to resharpen and features a hard hat/helmet clip for easy storage and access. INKZALL markers confirm Milwaukees commitment to best-in-class durability and their relentless mission to provide innovative solutions to the end user.

Name: Safety Works Pro Earmuffs
Long Description: Professional grade earmuffs. Features a premium cushioned headband to alleviate discomfort from a pressure point. Also includes a soft ear seal for comfort. Ideal for use with indoor and outdoor power tools.

Name: Wrap-It Storage 4 In. Hook & Loop Strip
Long Description: When regular strength just won't cut it. Bring on the heavy-duty power strips and tools. Our Industrial Strength Stick 'Em won't wilt under the weight of those harder hanging jobs. Get your garage, shed, home or RV organized like a pro!

Name: Gorilla Wood Filler
Long Description: All purpose wood filler is the go-to product for strong, durable repairs on cracks, gouges, and holes. The unique formula is easy to spread allowing for a smooth, natural finish. Its high performance stainability, paintability, and sandability provides you with a professional looking finished project. Shrink and crack resistant. Anchors nails and screws. Sandable, works with high speed sanders. Moldable and water resistant. Ideal for interior and exterior use. For outdoor use, coat with exterior paint. Not recommended for continuous water submersion.

Long Description: Industrial strength liquid toilet bowl cleaner is designed to clean and remove lime, rust, scale, and stains. Refreshing pine scent. Contains 15% hydrochloric acid. 32 oz. plastic container.

Name: Gorilla Max Strength Mounting Tape
Long Description: Gorilla Max Strength Mounting Tape, our strongest mounting tape, includes a mesh reinforced layer making it 1.5X stronger than our Heavy Duty Mounting Tape. It mounts in an instant for a permanent bond that holds 3 Lb. per 4 In. of tape. Gorilla Max Strength Mounting Tape is perfect for indoor projects and sticks to smooth and rough surfaces. Bonds permanently to painted walls, mirrors, plastic, metal, wood, glass, ceramic and more.
